tools.name: create_cad_workspace
tools.description: Create a ProtoGen CAD workspace for another agent or workflow.

tools.name: generate_cad_design
tools.description: Generate a parametric CAD design contract in a ProtoGen workspace.

tools.name: export_cad_design
tools.description: Export a CAD design as OpenSCAD, STEP contract metadata, or manufacturing brief.

tools.name: manufacturing_plan_from_spec
tools.description: Generate a manufacturing plan, BOM, DFM notes, and cost estimate from a product spec.

tools.name: describe
tools.description: Return ProtoGen capabilities and current CAD environment status.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Return ProtoGen health and workspace counts.
